//: Smoke environments — the full set used by the smoke harness. The first three (smoke-container / smoke-sqlproj / smoke-workload) are the base end-to-end checks; the rest extend coverage to every validator outcome (Parts 16-40 in planning/testing/steps.md). Copy this to <workspace>/.mssql/environments.json. Each env maps to a Part; see README.md for the per-env mapping and the manual prep (connection profiles, SQL, dacpacs) some of them need.

environments.name: Smoke — Container (Connectivity + UnitTests)
environments.description: Base env. tSQLt-loaded container; Connectivity + UnitTests end-to-end. Parts 6, 10, 11, 23, 28.

environments.name: Smoke — SqlProj (StaticAnalysis FAIL, unresolved ref)
environments.description: Base env. Raw .sqlproj → real build-time DacFx static analysis. GetCustomers references dbo.NonExistentTable → Static Analysis Failed with SQL71502. Parts 7, 20.

environments.name: Smoke — SqlProj clean (StaticAnalysis PASS)
environments.description: Clean .sqlproj → real build-time DacFx static analysis with every reference resolving → Static Analysis Passed, zero findings. Counterpart to smoke-sqlproj.

environments.name: Smoke — Workload (latency regression)
environments.description: Base env. Replay trips step-2 latency. Part 8.

environments.name: Smoke — Workload PASS (no regression)
environments.description: Part 16. Replay stays within tolerance on every step → WorkloadPlayback PASSED, zero regressions.

environments.name: Smoke — Workload throughput + error-rate regression
environments.description: Part 17. Replay drops throughput 50% and raises error rate → throughput + error-rate findings (not just latency).

environments.name: Smoke — Bad connection (Connectivity FAILS, gates rest)
environments.description: Part 18. References a connection profile that does not exist → Connectivity Failed, remaining validations Gated/Skipped.

environments.name: Smoke — Dacpac (StaticAnalysis Skip, pre-built)
environments.description: Part 19. SmokeProject.dacpac is a pre-built artifact → Static Analysis Skipped (DACPAC_PREBUILT): DacFx analysis runs at build time, so there is no build to analyze here. Point at a .sqlproj (smoke-sqlproj) to see a real Failed.

environments.name: Smoke — Dacpac clean (StaticAnalysis Skip, pre-built)
environments.description: Part 40. SmokeProjectClean.dacpac is a pre-built artifact → Static Analysis Skipped (DACPAC_PREBUILT): analysis ran at build time. Point at a clean .sqlproj (smoke-sqlproj-clean) to see a real Passed.

environments.name: Smoke — Workload slow replay
environments.description: Part 22 (approx). Replay sleeps ~20s. NOTE: the run timeout (timeoutMs) is a runner option with no UI knob, so this mainly lets you observe a long-running validation + manual Cancel; true timeout firing is covered by unit tests.

environments.name: Smoke — No tSQLt target (UnitTests Skipped)
environments.description: Part 34. References the 'smoke-local-master' profile (DB = master, no tSQLt) → Connectivity Passed, UnitTests Skipped ('tSQLt not installed'). Requires saving the master profile (see README.md).

environments.name: Smoke — Workload ERRORED (replay binary not found)
environments.description: Part 35. replayCommand is a bare name that does not exist → spawn ENOENT → WorkloadPlayback ERRORED (distinct from Failed). Artifacts exist so the validator reaches the spawn.

environments.name: Smoke — Disabled validation (UnitTests not run)
environments.description: Part 36. UnitTests is enabled:false → it does not run and produces no result row; Connectivity runs normally.

environments.name: Smoke — Workload artifact missing (Skipped)
environments.description: Part 37. workloadUri points at a file that does not exist → WorkloadPlayback Skipped ('artifact not found'), graceful (positive test of the fixed #5 path).
